title: Add Rating System for Reports and Dashboards
story: As a Salesforce administrator, I want to assign a quality rating to each report and dashboard, so that I can indicate the validity and data quality of analytics assets.
description:
Analytics professionals typically assign a rating or grade to reports based on data validity and quality. This feature adds a 3-star rating system per analytics asset (report or dashboard).

Pending customer feedback before implementation.
acceptance_criteria: Each report and dashboard has a rating data point
Rating can be set and updated from the report/dashboard sidebar
Rating is visible in the reports/dashboards list view
ux_changes: 3-star rating UI on report/dashboard sidebar and list view.
middleware_changes: Rating CRUD logic for analytics assets.
data_model_changes: New rating column on report/dashboard records.
implementation_notes: Awaiting customer feedback before implementation. 3-star scale chosen for simplicity.
